CryptoMudra (क्रिप्टोमुद्रा) is a practical Hinglish YouTube channel (@cryptomudraa) focused on real-world Web3, Crypto Mining, Solana Ecosystem, and On-Chain Analysis.

Channel Overview:
- Primary language: Hinglish (simple Hindi + English)
- Content style: Hands-on, experiment-driven, step-by-step tutorials with live demonstrations
- Target audience: Indian and South Asian developers, traders, and Web3 enthusiasts

Core Topics:
- Solana meme coin and token creation, smart contract development and deployment
- Real crypto mining experiments (Kaspa, Solana, Dogecoin, Bitcoin, Android mining)
- On-chain analysis, whale wallet tracking, and liquidity monitoring
- Trading bots, airdrop farming, early altcoin research, and market trend analysis

Goal: Deliver practical, actionable crypto education through real setups and transparent results (including failures).
